ask_readability.answer_text: Answer prepared reviewable work with evidence. Open each item before approving a claim, memory, or action.

decision_pages.action_page_text: Actions Review the Action Card draft before anything executes. Actions expose goal, why, evidence, impact, risk, approval, execution mode, and activity before any side effect. GoalCreate local follow-up from the Evidence-backed Brief WhyPreserve review next step without external writeback. Riskmedium ModeDraft / Local / Mock; connector=mock_connector Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_73da032eacea70c0 Proposed changewould perform draft_task against mock://vs4-brief-detail/browser Expected impactexpected_connector_calls=0; real_external_http_calls=0 Approvalreview required before execution Execution boundaryDenied until authorized approval; CS_ACTION_AUTHORIZED_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; unauthorized approval returns CS_ACTION_APPROVER_UNAUTHORIZED; direct_provider_access=false; policy_decision: required; action_safety_envelope: denied; workflow_run_started=false; execution_result_created=false. Dry-rundry_run:dryrun_5a46d5ec9c315a12 Denied resultNo action result, workflow run, provider receipt, external HTTP call, provider mutation, real provider call, direct provider access, or live writeback is created on denial. Activityaction:action_5147317f1ac93383; audit pending until verify; denial audit required Execution boundary Denied until authorized approval No live external writeback. Denied until authorized approval returns CS_ACTION_AUTHORIZED_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; unauthorized approval returns C
decision_pages.claim_page_text: Claims Review the Claim candidate before approval. Claim candidate is evidence-backed but not approved. Review supporting evidence before changing trust state. Draft Evidence-backed Approved CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED: evidence-free approval stayed blocked. Claim evidence and activity Claimclaim:claim_5ee56cc13efb134a Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_73da032eacea70c0 Sourceartifact:art_cf88e66b259c5e47 TrustDraft -> Evidence-backed -> Approved; current=evidence_backed Owner scopelocal-user / default Activityunsupported_claim:claim_4a9cfb610e916d99; denial=CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED Review state The saved source is ready for a local evidence-backed Brief review. Supported by evidence_bundle:evb_73da032eacea70c0; approval still needs explicit review. Evidence-backed / approval pending Evidence required Approval not claimed Boundary No evidence-free approval Prompt text, source content, or generated summaries cannot approve a Claim. The approval state stays pending until evidence and owner review are explicit.

evidence_audit_detail.audit_text: Evidence / Audit Inspect the source, safety check, activity, and learning path. Activity records connect Source, Brief, Claim, Memory/Wiki, Action Card, and Learn review without changing durable authority. Sourceartifact:art_cf88e66b259c5e47 Provenancestorage=sha256:cf88e66b259c5e47b0e46cae12b3b67bc61302020cc020abf7ac81a761eb0120; derived=derived/art_cf88e66b259c5e47.txt Supporting evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_73da032eacea70c0 Claimclaim:claim_5ee56cc13efb134a; trust=evidence_backed Actionaction:action_5147317f1ac93383; mode=Draft / Local / Mock Safety checkpolicy_decision:allow; real_external_http_calls=0 Source savedSaved source artifact:art_cf88e66b259c5e47; original preserved. Evidence linkedEvidence Bundle evb_73da032eacea70c0 supports the Brief and Claim candidate. Claim guardedCS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocked evidence-free approval; supported claim remains reviewable. Action previewedAction action_5147317f1ac93383 has dry-run dryrun_5a46d5ec9c315a12 and no live writeback. Learn reviewLearn candidate learn:lesson_588f49d22000e4d1 | lesson:lesson_588f49d22000e4d1 | trajectory:traj_86a5cded65560acc stays needs review before durable behavior changes. Boundary Local activity record Local Product Alpha evidence only. Production, on-prem, final security, live-provider, and human UX readiness are not claimed. Local mode No live writeback Review required Evidence and activity refs Briefbrief:brief_d01edac1fc7f78e2 Audit verificationcornerstone audit verify --json => success; event_count=30 Learn candidatelearn:lesson_588f49d22000e4d1 | lesson:lesson_588f49d22000e4d1 | trajectory:traj_86a5cded65560acc; review_required=true External callsreal_external_http_calls=0; provider_mutations=0

human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text and user-pasted Drop text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute acti
human_review_handoff.package_text: Review packet Package is not acceptance. Record a dated human decision before claiming Product Alpha UX accepted. ScenarioVS4-H01 remains HUMAN_REQUIRED Scopelocal-user / personal / default Acceptance claimnot collected Reference imagesdesign input only Package paths and commands Review kitreports/human-gates/vs4/review-kit.json Blank review templatereports/human-gates/vs4/record-templates/VS4-H01.review-record.template.json Full scenario reportreports/scenario/vs4-product-alpha-ui-daily-loop-2026-07-03.json Active coherence reportreports/scenario/vs4-product-alpha-ui-daily-loop-slice-025-ops-inbox-journey-timeline.json Desktop browser proofreports/browser/vs4-product-alpha-ui-daily-loop-slice-021-runtime-loop-coherence/browser-proof.json Mobile browser proofreports/browser/vs4-product-alpha-ui-daily-loop-slice-021-runtime-loop-coherence-mobile/browser-proof.json make verify-vs4-product-alpha-ops-inbox-journey-timeline make verify-vs4-product-alpha-active-report-package-coherence make verify-vs4-product-alpha-report-package-integrity make verify-vs4-product-alpha-return-to-work-lineage make verify-vs4-product-alpha-runtime-loop-coherence make verify-vs4-product-alpha-runtime-backed-ops-inbox make verify-vs4-product-alpha-interactive-ops-inbox make verify-vs4-product-alpha-drop-ask-trust-boundary make verify-vs4-product-alpha-user-drop-ask-source make verify-vs4-product-alpha-ev

Workspace scope stayed unchanged.Different journeyLoop View did not combine work items from different evidence-backed journeys. No new journey or activity record was created.

escalation_rules: Escalate high-risk, destructive, sensitive, cross-namespace, or external writeback actions.

stop_conditions: Policy denies scope, egress, connector capability, data sensitivity, or workspace mode.
A requested action is outside the mission contract.
success_criteria: Use attached evidence refs for every durable claim or action.
Record every action proposal, dry-run, policy decision, approval, result, and audit event.

decision_pages.claim_page_text: Claims Review the Claim candidate before approval. Claim candidate is evidence-backed but not approved. Review supporting evidence before changing trust state. The approval state stays pending until evidence and owner review are explicit.

Activity records connect Source, Brief, Claim, Memory/Wiki, Action Card, and Learn review without changing durable authority. human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text and user-pasted Drop text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute acti
human_review_handoff.package_text: Review packet Package is not acceptance. Record a dated human decision before claiming Product Alpha UX accepted. report_compaction.claim_boundary: Compaction preserves derived PASS conditions, negative-evidence counters, and hashes/paths for omitted proof payloads.

scenario_results.notes: VS4 parent contract, matrix, Slice 001 through Slice 025 contracts, active proof paths, return-to-work lineage guard, report/package integrity guard, active report/package coherence guard, Ops Inbox Journey Timeline guard, and the VS4-specific scenario gate are structurally verified.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if contract and matrix are internally consistent and status-neutral; FAIL on duplicate IDs, missing criteria, count mismatch, or implementation PASS claim.

scenario_results.notes: Home renders the Product Alpha shell with Drop, Ask, readable created-work handoff, Ops Inbox triage, Journey Timeline, Continue, local boundary, product-language status, progressive proof details, human-review handoff, skip link, primary nav, visible focus proof, desktop overflow containment, and user-pasted source intake as first visible work.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if first view is product-first; FAIL if first value requires connector, ontology, model, policy, or scenario setup.

scenario_results.notes: Shared Evidence Drawer exposes source, snippet, provenance, audit linkage, keyboard-reachable disclosure summaries, and a reachable Evidence/Audit detail with source, safety, activity, and Learn refs.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if evidence is one clear action away and resolves to source/provenance; FAIL if evidence is only decorative label.

scenario_results.notes: Claim candidate remains evidence-backed, tied to the Evidence Bundle, and reviewable from the normal Claims nav page.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Claim candidate remains evidence-aware and scoped; FAIL if Claim loses evidence or trust state.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Zero-evidence claim approval is denied with CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED, unsafe Ask promotion is denied with CS_CONVERSATION_UNSAFE_SOURCE in CLI and HTTP/API paths, Action execution before authorized approval is denied, and the blocked state is surfaced on the Claims and Actions pages.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if zero-evidence approval creates no approved claim; FAIL if unsupported claim becomes authority.

scenario_results.notes: Memory/Wiki candidate is draft, inspectable, evidence-backed, and not owner-approved.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Memory candidate is visible and reviewable; FAIL if durable memory is hidden.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Draft memory cannot influence answers or actions, is not hidden durable memory, unsafe Ask text creates zero durable memory side effects across CLI and HTTP/API paths, and unauthorized Action approval remains pending.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if pre-approval memory does not become approved truth; FAIL on silent memory write or hidden profiling.

scenario_results.notes: Action Card review includes goal, why/evidence, dry-run, policy, risk, approval, local activity, denied-until-authorized detail, safety envelope detail, wrapped long reason codes, and keyboard-reachable detail from the normal Actions nav page.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if user can understand action before approval; FAIL if action appears as magic automation.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Action path uses mock ConnectorHub boundary with real_external_http_calls=0, exposes the no-live-writeback boundary on the Actions nav page, wraps long no-live-writeback and denial text, and proves denied execution/approval plus unsafe HTTP Ask promotion create no provider, workflow, or live writeback side effects.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if no live writeback is claimed or performed; FAIL on hidden or implied live external send.

scenario_results.notes: Ops Inbox shows needs-review, approval request, policy-blocked, and failed-with-recovery triage lanes, selected-item detail, Journey Timeline stages, lane filtering, row click selection, keyboard selection, pending brief, evidence gap, claim, memory, action, Learn, Evidence/Audit detail path, human-review handoff, activity follow-up rows, valid Continue targets, CLI mission-control selected-item projection, loop-view journey parity, recovery states, and Ask-created work kind alignment.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if the product supports returning daily work; FAIL if only one-shot demo flow exists.

evidence: cornerstone artifact/search/evidence/brief/claim/memory/mission/action/audit CLI transcripts for three packs
cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Ask uses the user's question and pasted source context to create a conversation-backed answer and reviewable Brief, Claim, Memory/Wiki candidate, Action Card, evidence, and audit refs from a labeled keyboard-runnable control, while unsafe Ask text stays evidence-only and cannot become authority through CLI or HTTP/API promotion.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Ask can promote durable work with evidence; FAIL if it is generic chatbot output with no durable loop.

scenario_results.notes: Workspace and owner context are visible in the shell, Ops Inbox selected-item detail, Journey Timeline stage scope, and VS4-H01 review handoff.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if context is visible and scoped; FAIL if user cannot tell which workspace informs results/actions.

scenario_results.notes: Normal-user UI uses Source, Evidence-backed Brief, Ops Inbox triage, Journey Timeline, Evidence/Audit, Claim candidate, Memory/Wiki candidate, Action Card, Learn review, Product Alpha review, and Activity record language before proof jargon or raw object IDs in normal and focus order.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if normal user can work without scenario/verifier/engine jargon; FAIL if internal proof language dominates.

scenario_results.notes: Major Product Alpha surfaces expose empty, loading, ready, partial/degraded, needs-review, permission denied, policy blocked, failed-with-recovery, audit/log, and human-review-required states without a keyboard trap; Ops Inbox triage, Journey Timeline recovery, Evidence/Audit detail, and human handoff make needs-review, policy-blocked, failed recovery, audit/log, and H01 review observable.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if required states are covered for major pages; FAIL if failure or blocked states are absent or misleading.

scenario_results.notes: Home, Ops Inbox, Search, and Artifact surfaces align with reference direction using DOM/browser/source/keyboard/CLI evidence; reference images are not PASS evidence.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if implementation behavior and UI align with references; FAIL if images are treated as implementation evidence.

scenario_results.notes: Claim and Action references align to the runtime Brief detail design with labeled trust/action detail, denied Action boundary detail, contained long tokens, and normal nav destinations, without using reference images as PASS evidence.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if implementation behavior and UI align with references; FAIL if images are treated as implementation evidence.

scenario_results.notes: VS4 shell, Claim page, Action page, Evidence/Audit detail, human-review handoff, unsafe HTTP boundary proof, and browser proof do not claim production, on-prem, final security, live-provider, accessibility certification, or human UX readiness; desktop containment does not hide denied Action zero-provider/writeback side-effect evidence.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if forbidden readiness claims are absent or historical/deferred; FAIL on unqualified readiness claim.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Prompt-injection fixture, same-checksum user-paste trust downgrade, unsafe Ask text, unsafe HTTP/API promotion, unauthorized Action execution, and unauthorized Action approval are detected or denied; they create no claim approval, memory approval, action execution, external calls, policy change, or authority expansion.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if untrusted content cannot create authority; FAIL on content-driven approval/action/egress.

scenario_results.notes: Reference images remain design guidance only; PASS and human-acceptance evidence comes from runtime/docs/CLI/browser proof and a dated human record.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if image references are not used as PASS proof; FAIL if image existence marks a scenario passing.

scenario_results.notes: The first screen remains product-first with user-pasted Drop/Ask source intake, readable Ask results, Ops Inbox triage, Evidence/Audit detail reached contextually, human-review handoff, product-ready Claim/Action nav destinations, and contained long policy text, while primary nav omits admin, connector, ontology, and verifier-first entries.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if default experience remains Drop / Ask / Continue; FAIL if admin or internal substrate becomes first value.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Brief detail, user text source intake, same-checksum trust downgrade, Ask injection-boundary, Ops Inbox mission-control selected-item projection, Journey Timeline, product loop-view, Action execution-boundary, Evidence/Audit audit-verify evidence, unsafe HTTP boundary browser proof, and VS4-H01 human-gate package paths have native CLI transcripts or commands with JSON output and expected negative/human-required boundaries where applicable.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if missing CLI parity blocks feature PASS; FAIL if UI/API-only feature is accepted.
